# Argo Studio

> Photography business management built by photographers, for photographers.

Argo Studio (argostudio.co) is a SaaS tool that handles contracts, invoices, scheduling, client communication, and gallery delivery for professional photographers. Unlike general-purpose CRMs, Argo is designed specifically around photography workflows.

## Key Features
- Client portal with questionnaires and timeline sharing
- Contract and invoice automation
- Session scheduling and calendar integration
- Gallery delivery integration (Pic-Time, ShootProof, CloudSpot, Pixieset)
- Shot list management
- Automated payment reminders and follow-ups

## Who It's For
- Wedding photographers
- Portrait and family photographers
- Commercial and product photographers
- Any photographer running a client-based business

## Creator Code Program
Argo's referral program for photographers: 75% of first month revenue, 30% recurring lifetime commission.
